description: Inquiry Removal Next.js performance guardrail. Run after pnpm build to catch accidental bundle/CSS bloat.
notes: PageSpeed is the final source of truth after deployment.
Keep most components as Server Components.
Only use client components for calculators, filters, navigation state, route warmup, and the quiz.
Do not add autoplay video, social embeds, chat widgets, or tracking scripts without retesting PageSpeed.
Keep page-specific CSS imported by route pages so the homepage stays lean while route prefetching keeps navigation fast.
